//! # Fusion Finance Engine
//! 
//! High-Performance Financial Engineering framework.
//! Features:
//! - FIX Protocol Parser
//! - Limit Order Book (LOB)
//! - Market Data Types

pub mod fix_engine;
pub mod order_book;
pub mod market_data;

pub use fix_engine::FixMessage;
pub use order_book::{OrderBook, Order, Side};
